        description = "Detection for Metasploit Wrap-Up 03/27/2026"

        date = "2026-03-28"

    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-1679 - net: eswifi socket send payload length not b"; content:"CVE-2026-1679"; nocase; sid:4132247; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4987 - SureForms <= 2.5.2 - Unauthenticated Payment"; content:"CVE-2026-4987"; nocase; sid:7820682; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2025-12886 - Oxygen <= 6.0.8 - Unauthenticated Server-Si"; content:"CVE-2025-12886"; nocase; sid:4440950; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
